assert_eq!(manager.session_count().await, 2);\n\n    manager.delete_session(\"session-1\").await;\n\n    assert_eq!(manager.session_count().await, 1);\n}\n\n#[tokio::test]\nasync fn test_multiple_writes_same_session_preserves_pin() {\n    let manager = default_manager();\n\n    let session_id = \"test-session-multi\";\n    let first_group = 2;\n\n    // First write pins to group 2\n    manager\n        .record_write_with_quorum(session_id, \"mtask-1\".to_string(), first_group)\n        .await\n        .unwrap();\n\n    assert_eq!(\n        manager.get_session(session_id).await.unwrap().pinned_group,\n        Some(first_group)\n    );\n\n    // Second write tries to pin to group 3 (should be ignored)\n    manager\n        .record_write_with_quorum(session_id, \"mtask-2\".to_string(), 3)\n        .await\n        .unwrap();\n\n    // Pin should still be group 2 (first write wins)\n    assert_eq!(\n        manager.get_session(session_id).await.unwrap().pinned_group,\n        Some(first_group)\n    );\n}\n\n#[tokio::test]\nasync fn test_max_wait_duration() {\n    let config = SessionPinningConfig {\n        max_wait_ms: 10000,\n        ..Default::default()\n    };\n    let manager = test_manager(config);\n\n    assert_eq!(manager.max_wait_duration().as_millis(), 10000);\n}\n\n#[tokio::test]\nasync fn test_enabled_flag() {\n    let config = SessionPinningConfig {\n        enabled: false,\n        ..Default::default()\n    };\n    let manager = test_manager(config);\n\n    assert!(!manager.is_enabled());\n\n    // When disabled, record_write should succeed but be no-op\n    manager\n        .record_write_with_quorum(\"session-1\", \"mtask-1\".to_string(), 0)\n        .await\n        .unwrap();\n\n    // Session should not be recorded\n    assert!(manager.get_session(\"session-1\").await.is_none());\n}\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// Integration tests: read-your-writes with task registry (plan §13.6)\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\nuse miroir_core::task::{Task, TaskRegistry, TaskStatus};\nuse miroir_core::topology::{Node, NodeId, NodeStatus, Topology};\nuse std::collections::HashMap;\n\n/// Mock task registry for testing session pinning wait behavior.\nstruct MockTaskRegistry {\n    tasks: Arc<tokio::sync::RwLock<HashMap<String, Task>>>,\n}\n\nimpl MockTaskRegistry {\n    fn new() -> Self {\n        Self {\n            tasks: Arc::new(tokio::sync::RwLock::new(HashMap::new())),\n        }\n    }\n\n    /// Add a task with a specific status.\n    async fn add_task(&self, mtask_id: String, status: TaskStatus) {\n        let mut tasks = self.tasks.write().await;\n        tasks.insert(\n            mtask_id.clone(),\n            Task {\n                miroir_id: mtask_id.clone(),\n                node_task_ids: HashMap::new(),\n                status,\n                index_uid: None,\n                task_type: None,\n                created_at: std::time::SystemTime::now()\n                    .duration_since(std::time::UNIX_EPOCH)\n                    .unwrap()\n                    .as_millis() as u64,\n            },\n        );\n    }\n\n    /// Update a task's status.\n    async fn update_task(&self, mtask_id: &str, status: TaskStatus) {\n        let mut tasks = self.tasks.write().await;\n        if let Some(task) = tasks.get_mut(mtask_id) {\n            task.status = status;\n        }\n    }\n}\n\n#[async_trait::async_trait]\nimpl TaskRegistry for MockTaskRegistry {\n    async fn get(&self, mtask_id: &str) -> std::result::Result<Option<Task>, Box<dyn std::error::Error + Send + Sync>> {\n        let tasks = self.tasks.read().await;\n        Ok(tasks.get(mtask_id).cloned())\n    }\n\n    async fn register(\n        &self,\n        _node_task_ids: HashMap<String, u64>,\n    ) -> std::result::Result<Task, Box<dyn std::error::Error + Send + Sync>> {\n        // For testing, return a dummy task\n        Ok(Task {\n            miroir_id: \"mtask-test\".to_string(),\n            node_task_ids: HashMap::new(),\n            status: TaskStatus::Enqueued,\n            index_uid: None,\n            task_type: None,\n            created_at: std::time::SystemTime::now()\n                .duration_since(std::time::UNIX_EPOCH)\n                .unwrap()\n                .as_millis() as u64,\n        })\n    }\n\n    async fn register_with_metadata(\n        &self,\n        _node_task_ids: HashMap<String, u64>,\n        _index_uid: Option<String>,\n        _task_type: Option<String>,\n    ) -> std::result::Result<Task, Box<dyn std::error::Error + Send + Sync>> {\n        // For testing, return a dummy task\n        Ok(Task {\n            miroir_id: \"mtask-test\".to_string(),\n            node_task_ids: HashMap::new(),\n            status: TaskStatus::Enqueued,\n            index_uid: None,\n            task_type: None,\n            created_at: std::time::SystemTime::now()\n                .duration_since(std::time::UNIX_EPOCH)\n                .unwrap()\n                .as_millis() as u64,\n        })\n    }\n\n    async fn list(&self, _limit: usize, _offset: usize) -> std::result::Result<Vec<Task>, Box<dyn std::error::Error + Send + Sync>> {\n        Ok(Vec::new())\n    }\n\n    async fn cancel(&self, _mtask_id: &str) -> std::result::Result<Task, Box<dyn std::error::Error + Send + Sync>> {\n        Err(\"unimplemented\".into())\n    }\n\n    async fn delete(&self, _mtask_id: &str) -> std::result::Result<(), Box<dyn std::error::Error + Send + Sync>> {\n        Err(\"unimplemented\".into())\n    }\n}\n\n/// Acceptance test 1: Write + session + immediate read with `block` → read sees the write.\n///\n/// This test verifies that when using the \"block\" wait strategy, a read with a session\n/// header will wait for the pending write to complete before proceeding.\n#[tokio::test]\nasync fn acceptance_write_session_read_with_block_strategy() {\n    let config = SessionPinningConfig {\n        wait_strategy: \"block\".to_string(),\n        max_wait_ms: 5000,\n        ..Default::default()\n    };\n    let manager = test_manager(config);\n    let task_registry = Arc::new(MockTaskRegistry::new());\n\n    let session_id = \"test-session-block-read\";\n    let mtask_id = \"mtask-block-123\".to_string();\n\n    // Record a write with session pinning\n    manager\n        .record_write_with_quorum(session_id, mtask_id.clone(), 0)\n        .await\n        .unwrap();\n\n    // Verify the session is pinned\n    assert_eq!(\n        manager.get_pinned_group(session_id).await,\n        Some(0)\n    );\n\n    // Add the task as enqueued to the mock registry\n    task_registry.add_task(mtask_id.clone(), TaskStatus::Enqueued).await;\n\n    // Spawn a background task to complete the write after a short delay\n    let registry_clone = task_registry.clone();\n    let mtask_id_clone = mtask_id.clone();\n    tokio::spawn(async move {\n        sleep(Duration::from_millis(100)).await;\n        registry_clone.update_task(&mtask_id_clone, TaskStatus::Succeeded).await;\n    });\n\n    // Read with session should block and wait for the write to complete\n    let max_wait = Duration::from_millis(5000);\n    let result = manager.wait_for_write_completion(\n        session_id,\n        &task_registry,\n        max_wait,\n    ).await;\n\n    // The wait should succeed (write completed)\n    assert!(result.is_ok());\n    assert_eq!(result.unwrap(), true);\n\n    // After completion, the session should no longer have a pending write\n    let pinned_group = manager.get_pinned_group(session_id).await;\n    assert_eq!(pinned_group, None);\n}\n\n/// Acceptance test 2: Write + session + immediate read with `route_pin` → read routed to pinned group.\n///\n/// This test verifies that when using the \"route_pin\" wait strategy, a read with a session\n/// header routes to the pinned group without waiting for the write to complete.\n#[tokio::test]\nasync fn acceptance_write_session_read_with_route_pin_strategy() {\n    let config = SessionPinningConfig {\n        wait_strategy: \"route_pin\".to_string(),\n        max_wait_ms: 5000,\n        ..Default::default()\n    };\n    let manager = test_manager(config);\n    let task_registry = Arc::new(MockTaskRegistry::new());\n\n    let session_id = \"test-session-route-pin\";\n    let mtask_id = \"mtask-route-pin-123\".to_string();\n\n    // Record a write with session pinning\n    manager\n        .record_write_with_quorum(session_id, mtask_id, 1)\n        .await\n        .unwrap();\n\n    // Verify the session is pinned to group 1\n    assert_eq!(\n        manager.get_pinned_group(session_id).await,\n        Some(1)\n    );\n\n    // With route_pin strategy, we don't wait - just check the pinned group\n    let pinned_group = manager.get_pinned_group(session_id).await;\n    assert_eq!(pinned_group, Some(1));\n\n    // The pending write should still be present (not cleared by just reading)\n    assert!(manager.get_session(session_id).await.unwrap().has_pending_write());\n}\n\n/// Acceptance test 3: Pinned group fails mid-session → pin cleared; read succeeds via another group.\n///\n/// This test verifies that when the pinned group fails, the session pin is cleared\n/// and subsequent reads can succeed via other groups.\n#[tokio::test]\nasync fn acceptance_pinned_group_failure_clears_pin() {\n    let manager = default_manager();\n\n    let session_id = \"test-session-group-fail\";\n    let mtask_id = \"mtask-group-fail\".to_string();\n    let pinned_group = 2;\n\n    // Record a write that pins to group 2\n    manager\n        .record_write_with_quorum(session_id, mtask_id, pinned_group)\n        .await\n        .unwrap();\n\n    // Verify the session is pinned\n    assert_eq!(\n        manager.get_pinned_group(session_id).await,\n        Some(pinned_group)\n    );\n\n    // Simulate group 2 failing\n    let cleared = manager\n        .handle_pinned_group_failure(session_id, pinned_group)\n        .await;\n\n    assert!(cleared, \"Pin should be cleared when pinned group fails\");\n\n    // Pin should be cleared\n    assert_eq!(\n        manager.get_pinned_group(session_id).await,\n        None,\n        \"After group failure, no pinned group should be returned\"\n    );\n\n    // The session should still exist, but with no pin\n    let session = manager.get_session(session_id).await;\n    assert!(session.is_some(), \"Session should still exist\");\n    assert_eq!(session.unwrap().pinned_group, None, \"Session should have no pinned group\");\n}\n\n/// Acceptance test 4: Session TTL expiry and LRU eviction.\n///\n/// This test verifies that:\n/// - Sessions expire after their TTL\n/// - LRU eviction happens when max_sessions is reached\n#[tokio::test]\nasync fn acceptance_session_ttl_and_lru_eviction() {\n    let config = SessionPinningConfig {\n        ttl_seconds: 1,\n        max_sessions: 3,\n        ..Default::default()\n    };\n    let manager = test_manager(config);\n\n    // Create sessions up to the limit\n    manager\n        .record_write_with_quorum(\"session-1\", \"mtask-1\".to_string(), 0)\n        .await\n        .unwrap();\n    manager\n        .record_write_with_quorum(\"session-2\", \"mtask-2\".to_string(), 0)\n        .await\n        .unwrap();\n    manager\n        .record_write_with_quorum(\"session-3\", \"mtask-3\".to_string(), 0)\n        .await\n        .unwrap();\n\n    // All three should exist\n    assert!(manager.get_session(\"session-1\").await.is_some());\n    assert!(manager.get_session(\"session-2\").await.is_some());\n    assert!(manager.get_session(\"session-3\").await.is_some());\n\n    // Adding a 4th session should evict the oldest (session-1)\n    manager\n        .record_write_with_quorum(\"session-4\", \"mtask-4\".to_string(), 0)\n        .await\n        .unwrap();\n\n    // Session-1 should be evicted\n    assert!(manager.get_session(\"session-1\").await.is_none());\n\n    // Sessions 2, 3, 4 should still exist\n    assert!(manager.get_session(\"session-2\").await.is_some());\n    assert!(manager.get_session(\"session-3\").await.is_some());\n    assert!(manager.get_session(\"session-4\").await.is_some());\n\n    // Wait for TTL expiration\n    sleep(Duration::from_millis(1100)).await;\n\n    // All remaining sessions should be expired\n    assert!(manager.get_session(\"session-2\").await.unwrap().is_expired());\n    assert!(manager.get_session(\"session-3\").await.unwrap().is_expired());\n    assert!(manager.get_session(\"session-4\").await.unwrap().is_expired());\n\n    // Prune should remove all expired sessions\n    let pruned = manager.prune_expired().await;\n    assert_eq!(pruned, 3);\n\n    // No sessions should remain\n    assert!(manager.get_session(\"session-2\").await.is_none());\n    assert!(manager.get_session(\"session-3\").await.is_none());\n    assert!(manager.get_session(\"session-4\").await.is_none());\n}\n\n/// Integration test: Session pinning with scatter plan for pinned group.\n///\n/// This test verifies that `plan_search_scatter_for_group` correctly routes\n/// all shards to the pinned replica group.\n#[tokio::test]\nasync fn integration_session_pin_with_scatter_plan() {\n    use miroir_core::scatter::plan_search_scatter_for_group;\n    use miroir_core::topology::{Node, NodeId, NodeStatus, Topology};\n\n    // Build a 2-group, 2-node-per-group topology\n    let mut topo = Topology::new(4, 2, 2);\n\n    // Add nodes to group 0\n    for i in 0..2u32 {\n        let node = Node::new(\n            NodeId::new(format!(\"node-group0-{i}\")),\n            format!(\"http://localhost:810{i}\"),\n            0,\n        );\n        topo.add_node(node);\n        topo.node_mut(&NodeId::new(format!(\"node-group0-{i}\")))\n            .unwrap()\n            .transition_to(NodeStatus::Active)\n            .unwrap();\n    }\n\n    // Add nodes to group 1\n    for i in 2..4u32 {\n        let node = Node::new(\n            NodeId::new(format!(\"node-group1-{i}\")),\n            format!(\"http://localhost:810{i}\"),\n            1,\n        );\n        topo.add_node(node);\n        topo.node_mut(&NodeId::new(format!(\"node-group1-{i}\")))\n            .unwrap()\n            .transition_to(NodeStatus::Active)\n            .unwrap();\n    }\n\n    // Plan scatter for pinned group 1\n    let plan = plan_search_scatter_for_group(&topo, 0, 2, 4, 1);\n\n    assert!(plan.is_some(), \"Plan should be created for pinned group\");\n    let plan = plan.unwrap();\n\n    // Verify the plan targets the pinned group\n    assert_eq!(plan.chosen_group, 1, \"Chosen group should be the pinned group\");\n\n    // Verify all shards are targeted\n    assert_eq!(plan.target_shards.len(), 4, \"All shards should be targeted\");\n\n    // Verify all selected nodes are from group 1\n    for (_shard_id, node_id) in &plan.shard_to_node {\n        let node = topo.node(node_id).unwrap();\n        assert_eq!(node.replica_group, 1, \"All nodes should be from pinned group 1\");\n    }\n}\n\n/// Integration test: Session pinning metrics.\n///\n/// This test verifies that session pinning metrics are properly recorded.\n#[tokio::test]\nasync fn integration_session_pinning_metrics() {\n    use miroir_core::config::MiroirConfig;\n    use miroir_proxy::middleware::Metrics;\n\n    let config = metrics.observe_session_wait_duration(0.123);\n    metrics.observe_session_wait_duration(0.456);\n\n    // Test session_wait_timeout_total metric\n    metrics.inc_session_wait_timeout(\"block\");\n\n       ..Default::default()","+    };","+    let manager = test_manager(config);","+","+    // Create sessions up to the limit","+    manager","+        .record_write_with_quorum(\"session-1\", \"mtask-1\".to_string(), 0)","+        .await","+        .unwrap();","+    manager","+        .record_write_with_quorum(\"session-2\", \"mtask-2\".to_string(), 0)","+        .await","+        .unwrap();","+    manager","+        .record_write_with_quorum(\"session-3\", \"mtask-3\".to_string(), 0)","+        .await","+        .unwrap();","+","+    // All three should exist","+    assert!(manager.get_session(\"session-1\").await.is_some());","+    assert!(manager.get_session(\"session-2\").await.is_some());","+    assert!(manager.get_session(\"session-3\").await.is_some());","+","+    // Adding a 4th session should evict the oldest (session-1)","+    manager","+        .record_write_with_quorum(\"session-4\", \"mtask-4\".to_string(), 0)","+        .await","+        .unwrap();","+","+    // Session-1 should be evicted","+    assert!(manager.get_session(\"session-1\").await.is_none());","+","+    // Sessions 2, 3, 4 should still exist","+    assert!(manager.get_session(\"session-2\").await.is_some());","+    assert!(manager.get_session(\"session-3\").await.is_some());","+    assert!(manager.get_session(\"session-4\").await.is_some());","+","+    // Wait for TTL expiration","+    sleep(Duration::from_millis(1100)).await;","+","+    // All remaining sessions should be expired","+    assert!(manager.get_session(\"session-2\").await.unwrap().is_expired());","+    assert!(manager.get_session(\"session-3\").await.unwrap().is_expired());","+ assert!(manager.get_session(\"session-3\").await.is_none());","+    assert!(manager.get_session(\"session-4\").await.is_none());","+}","+","+/// Integration test: Session pinning with scatter plan for integration_session_pin_with_scatter_plan() {","+    use miroir_core::scatter::plan_search_scatter_for_group;","+    use miroir_core::topology::{Node, NodeId, NodeStatus, Topology};","+","+    // Build a 2-group, 2-node-per-group topology","+    let mut topo = Topology::new(4, 2, 2);","+","+    // Add nodes to group 0","+    for i in 0..2u32 {","+        let node = Node::new(","+            NodeId::new(format!(\"node-group0-{i}\")),","+            format!(\"http://localhost:810{i}\"),","+            0,","+        );","+        topo.add_node(node);","+        topo.node_mut(&NodeId::new(format!(\"node-group0-{i}\")))","+            .unwrap()","+            .transition_to(NodeStatus::Active)","+            .unwrap();","+    }","+","+    // Add nodes to group 1","+    for i in 2..4u32 {","+        let node = Node::new(","+            NodeId::new(format!(\"node-group1-{i}\")),","+            format!(\"http://localhost:810{i}\"),","+            1,","+        );","+        topo.add_node(node);","+        topo.node_mut(&NodeId::new(format!(\"node-group1-{i}\")))","+            .unwrap()","+            .transition_to(NodeStatus::Active)","+            .unwrap();","+    }","+","+    // Plan scatter for pinned group 1","+    let plan = plan_search_scatter_for_group(&topo, 0, 2, 4, 1);","+","+    assert!(plan.is_some(), \"Plan should be created for pinned group\");","+    let plan = plan.unwrap();","+","+    // Verify the plan targets the pinned group","+    assert_eq!(plan.chosen_group, 1, \"Chosen group should be the pinned group\");","+","+ node_id) in &plan.shard_to_node {","+        let node = topo.node(node_id).unwrap();","+        assert_eq!(node.replica_group, 1, \"All nodes should be from pinned group 1\");","+    }","+}","+","+/// Session pinning acceptance tests (plan §13.6).\n//!\n//! Tests read-your-writes consistency via session pinning:\n//! - Write with session header → session pinned to first-quorum group\n//! - Read with session header → routes to pinned group if pending write\n//! - Block strategy: read blocks until write completes\n//! - RoutePin strategy: read routes to pinned group without waiting\n//! - Session TTL and LRU eviction\n//! - Pinned group failure handling\n\nuse std::sync::Arc;\nuse tokio::time::{sleep, Duration};\nuse miroir_core::session_pinning::{SessionManager, SessionPinningConfig, WaitStrategy};\n\n/// Helper to create a test session manager with custom config.\nfn test_manager(config: SessionPinningConfig) -> SessionManager {\n    SessionManager::new(config)\n}\n\n/// Helper to create a default test session manager.\nfn default_manager() -> SessionManager {\n    test_manager(SessionPinningConfig::default())\n}\n\n#[tokio::test]\nasync fn test_write_records_session_pin() {\n    let manager = default_manager();\n\n    // Record a write with session header\n    let session_id = \"test-session-1\";\n    let mtask_id = \"mtask-123\".to_string();\n    let first_quorum_group = 2;\n\n    manager\n        .record_write_with_quorum(session_id, mtask_id.clone(), first_quorum_group)\n        .await\n        .unwrap();\n\n    // Verify session is recorded\n    let session = manager.get_session(session_id).await.unwrap();\n    assert_eq!(session.last_write_mtask_id, Some(mtask_id));\n    assert_eq!(session.pinned_group, Some(first_quorum_group));\n    assert!(session.has_pending_write());\n}\n\n#[tokio::test]\nasync fn test_read_with_pending_write_returns_pinned_group() {\n    let manager = default_manager();\n\n    // Record a write\n    let session_id = \"test-session-2\";\n    let mtask_id = \"mtask-456\".to_string();\n    let first_quorum_group = 1;\n\n    manager\n        .record_write_with_quorum(session_id, mtask_id, first_quorum_group)\n        .await\n        .unwrap();\n\n    // Get pinned group for read\n    let pinned_group = manager.get_pinned_group(session_id).await;\n    assert_eq!(pinned_group, Some(first_quorum_group));\n}\n\n#[tokio::test]\nasync fn test_read_without_session_returns_none() {\n    let manager = default_manager();\n\n    // No session header\n    let pinned_group = manager.get_pinned_group(\"nonexistent\").await;\n    assert_eq!(pinned_group, None);\n}\n\n#[tokio::test]\nasync fn test_write_without_clearing_pending_write() {\n    let manager = default_manager();\n\n    let session_id = \"test-session-3\";\n    let mtask_id = \"mtask-789\".to_string();\n\n    // Record a write\n    manager\n        .record_write_with_quorum(session_id, mtask_id.clone(), 0)\n        .await\n        .unwrap();\n\n    // Verify pending write exists\n    assert!(manager.get_session(session_id).await.unwrap().has_pending_write());\n\n    // Clear pending write (simulating task completion)\n    manager.clear_pending_write(session_id).await;\n\n    // Verify no pending write\n    assert!(!manager.get_session(session_id).await.unwrap().has_pending_write());\n\n    // Read should not return pinned group (no pending write)\n    let pinned_group = manager.get_pinned_group(session_id).await;\n    assert_eq!(pinned_group, None);\n}\n\n#[tokio::test]\nasync fn test_session_expiration() {\n    let config = SessionPinningConfig {\n        ttl_seconds: 1, // 1 second TTL for testing\n        ..Default::default()\n    };\n    let manager = test_manager(config);\n\n    let session_id = \"test-session-expire\";\n    let mtask_id = \"mtask-expire\".to_string();\n\n    // Record a write\n    manager\n        .record_write_with_quorum(session_id, mtask_id, 0)\n        .await\n        .unwrap();\n\n    // Session should be active immediately\n    assert!(!manager.get_session(session_id).await.unwrap().is_expired());\n\n    // Wait for expiration\n    sleep(Duration::from_millis(1100)).await;\n\n    // Session should be expired\n    assert!(manager.get_session(session_id).await.unwrap().is_expired());\n\n    // Pinned group should be None for expired session\n    let pinned_group = manager.get_pinned_group(session_id).await;\n    assert_eq!(pinned_group, None);\n}\n\n#[tokio::test]\nasync fn test_max_sessions_lru_eviction() {\n    let config = SessionPinningConfig {\n        max_sessions: 2,\n        ..Default::default()\n    };\n    let manager = test_manager(config);\n\n    // Add first session\n    manager\n        .record_write_with_quorum(\"session-1\", \"mtask-1\".to_string(), 0)\n        .await\n        .unwrap();\n\n    // Add second session\n    manager\n        .record_write_with_quorum(\"session-2\", \"mtask-2\".to_string(), 0)\n        .await\n        .unwrap();\n\n    // Add third session (should evict first session)\n    manager\n        .record_write_with_quorum(\"session-3\", \"mtask-3\".to_string(), 0)\n        .await\n        .unwrap();\n\n    // First session should be evicted\n    assert!(manager.get_session(\"session-1\").await.is_none());\n\n    // Second and third should still exist\n    assert!(manager.get_session(\"session-2\").await.is_some());\n    assert!(manager.get_session(\"session-3\").await.is_some());\n}\n\n#[tokio::test]\nasync fn test_pinned_group_failure_clears_pin() {\n    let manager = default_manager();\n\n    let session_id = \"test-session-fail\";\n    let mtask_id = \"mtask-fail\".to_string();\n    let pinned_group = 1;\n\n    // Record a write\n    manager\n        .record_write_with_quorum(session_id, mtask_id, pinned_group)\n        .await\n        .unwrap();\n\n    // Verify pin is set\n    assert_eq!(\n pinned_group)\n        .await;\n\n    assert!(cleared);\n\n    // Pin should be cleared\n    assert_eq!(manager.get_pinned_group(session_id).await, None);\n}\n\n#[tokio::test]\nasync fn test_wait_strategy() {\n    let config = SessionPinningConfig {\n        wait_strategy: \"route_pin\".to_string(),\n        ..Default::default()\n    };\n    let manager = test_manager(config);\n\n    assert_eq!(manager.wait_strategy(), WaitStrategy::RoutePin);\n\n    let config = SessionPinningConfig {\n        wait_strategy: \"block\".to_string(),\n        ..Default::default()\n    };\n    let manager = test_manager(config);\n\n    assert_eq!(manager.wait_strategy(), WaitStrategy::Block);\n\n    // Unknown strategy defaults to Block\n    let config = SessionPinningConfig {\n WaitStrategy::Block);\n}\n\n#[tokio::test]\nasync fn test_prune_expired_sessions() {\n    let config = SessionPinningConfig {\n        ttl_seconds: 1,\n        ..Default::default()\n    };\n    let manager = test_manager(config);\n\n    // Add sessions\n    manager\n        .record_write_with_quorum(\"session-active\", \"mtask-a\".to_string(), 0)\n        .await\n        .unwrap();\n    manager\n        .record_write_with_quorum(\"session-expire\", \"mtask-b\".to_string(), 0)\n        .await\n        .unwrap();\n\n    // Wait for expiration\n       .await\n        .unwrap();\n\n    // Add another active session\n    manager\n        .record_write_with_quorum(\"session-active-2\", \"mtask-c\".to_string(), 0)\n        .await\n        .unwrap();\n\n    // Prune expired\n    let pruned = manager.prune_expired().await;\n\n    // Should have pruned 1 expired session (session-expire)\n    assert_eq!(pruned, 1);\n\n    // Expired session should be gone\n    assert!(manager.get_session(\"session-expire\").await.is_none());\n\n    // Active sessions should still exist\n    assert!(manager.get_session(\"session-active\").await.is_some());\n    assert!(manager.get_session(\"session-active-2\").await.is_some());\n}\n\n#[tokio::test]\nasync fn test_delete_session() {\n    let manager = default_manager();\n\n    let session_id = \"test-session-delete\";\n    manager\n        .record_write_with_quorum(session_id, \"mtask-delete\".to_string(), 0)\n        .await\n        .unwrap();\n\n    // Verify session exists\n    assert!(manager.get_session(session_id).await.is_some());\n\n    // Delete session\n    let deleted = manager.delete_session(session_id).await;\n    assert!(deleted);\n\n    // Verify session is gone\n    assert!(manager.get_session(session_id).await.is_none());\n\n    // Delete again should return false\n    let deleted_again = manager.delete_session(session_id).await;\n    assert!(!deleted_again);\n}\n\n#[tokio::test]\nasync fn test_session_count() {\n    let manager = default_manager();\n\n    assert_eq!(manager.session_count().await, 0);\n\n    manager\n        .record_write_with_quorum(\"session-1\", \"mtask-1\".to_string(), 0)\n        .await\n        .unwrap();\n\n test_multiple_writes_same_session_preserves_pin() {\n    let manager = default_manager();\n\n    let session_id = \"test-session-multi\";\n    let first_group = 2;\n\n    // First write pins to group Session pinning acceptance tests (plan §13.6).\n//!\n//! Tests read-your-writes consistency via session pinning:\n//! - Write with session header → session pinned to first-quorum group\n//! - Read with session header → routes to pinned group if pending write\n//! - Block strategy: read blocks until write completes\n//! - RoutePin strategy: read routes to pinned group without waiting\n//! - Session TTL and LRU eviction\n//! - Pinned group failure handling\n\nuse std::sync::Arc;\nuse tokio::time::{sleep, Duration};\nuse miroir_core::session_pinning::{SessionManager, SessionPinningConfig, WaitStrategy};\n\n/// Helper to create a test session manager with custom config.\nfn test_manager(config: SessionPinningConfig) -> SessionManager {\n    SessionManager::new(config)\n}\n\n/// Helper to create a default test session manager.\nfn default_manager() -> SessionManager {\n    test_manager(SessionPinningConfig::default())\n}\n\n#[tokio::test]\nasync fn test_write_records_session_pin() {\n    let manager = default_manager();\n\n    // Record a write with session header\n    let session_id = \"test-session-1\";\n    let mtask_id = \"mtask-123\".to_string();\n    let first_quorum_group = 2;\n\n    manager\n        .record_write_with_quorum(session_id, mtask_id.clone(), first_quorum_group)\n        .await\n        .unwrap();\n\n    // Verify session is recorded\n    let session = manager.get_session(session_id).await.unwrap();\n    assert_eq!(session.last_write_mtask_id, Some(mtask_id));\n    assert_eq!(session.pinned_group, Some(first_quorum_group));\n    assert!(session.has_pending_write());\n}\n\n#[tokio::test]\nasync fn test_read_with_pending_write_returns_pinned_group() {\n    let manager = default_manager();\n\n    // Record a write\n    let session_id = \"test-session-2\";\n    let mtask_id = \"mtask-456\".to_string();\n    let first_quorum_group = 1;\n\n    manager\n        .record_write_with_quorum(session_id, mtask_id, first_quorum_group)\n        .await\n        .unwrap();\n\n    // Get pinned group for read\n    let pinned_group = manager.get_pinned_group(session_id).await;\n    assert_eq!(pinned_group, Some(first_quorum_group));\n}\n\n#[tokio::test]\nasync fn test_read_without_session_returns_none() {\n    let manager = default_manager();\n\n    // No session header\n    let pinned_group = manager.get_pinned_group(\"nonexistent\").await;\n    assert_eq!(pinned_group, None);\n}\n\n#[tokio::test]\nasync fn test_write_without_clearing_pending_write() {\n    let manager = default_manager();\n\n    let session_id = \"test-session-3\";\n    let mtask_id = \"mtask-789\".to_string();\n\n    // Record a write\n    manager\n        .record_write_with_quorum(session_id, mtask_id.clone(), 0)\n        .await\n        .unwrap();\n\n    // Verify pending write exists\n    assert!(manager.get_session(session_id).await.unwrap().has_pending_write());\n\n    // Clear pending write (simulating task completion)\n    manager.clear_pending_write(session_id).await;\n\n    // Verify no pending write\n    assert!(!manager.get_session(session_id).await.unwrap().has_pending_write());\n\n    // Read should not return pinned group (no pending write)\n    let pinned_group = manager.get_pinned_group(session_id).await;\n    assert_eq!(pinned_group, None);\n}\n\n#[tokio::test]\nasync fn test_session_expiration() {\n    let config = SessionPinningConfig {\n        ttl_seconds: 1, // 1 second TTL for testing\n        ..Default::default()\n    };\n    let manager = test_manager(config);\n\n    let session_id = \"test-session-expire\";\n    let mtask_id = \"mtask-expire\".to_string();\n\n    // Record a write\n    manager\n        .record_write_with_quorum(session_id, mtask_id, 0)\n        .await\n        .unwrap();\n\n    // Session should be active immediately\n    assert!(!manager.get_session(session_id).await.unwrap().is_expired());\n\n    // Wait for expiration\n    sleep(Duration::from_millis(1100)).await;\n\n    // Session should be expired\n    assert!(manager.get_session(session_id).await.unwrap().is_expired());\n\n    // Pinned group should be None for expired session\n    let pinned_group = manager.get_pinned_group(session_id).await;\n    assert_eq!(pinned_group, None);\n}\n\n#[tokio::test]\nasync fn test_max_sessions_lru_eviction() {\n    let config = SessionPinningConfig {\n        max_sessions: 2,\n        ..Default::default()\n    };\n    let manager = test_manager(config);\n\n    // Add first session\n    manager\n        .record_write_with_quorum(\"session-1\", \"mtask-1\".to_string(), 0)\n        .await\n        .unwrap();\n\n    // Add second session\n    manager\n        .record_write_with_quorum(\"session-2\", \"mtask-2\".to_string(), 0)\n        .await\n        .unwrap();\n\n    // Add third session (should evict first session)\n    manager\n        .record_write_with_quorum(\"session-3\", \"mtask-3\".to_string(), 0)\n        .await\n        .unwrap();\n\n    // First session should be evicted\n    assert!(manager.get_session(\"session-1\").await.is_none());\n\n    // Second and third should still exist\n    assert!(manager.get_session(\"session-2\").await.is_some());\n    assert!(manager.get_session(\"session-3\").await.is_some());\n}\n\n#[tokio::test]\nasync fn test_pinned_group_failure_clears_pin() {\n    let manager = default_manager();\n\n    let session_id = \"test-session-fail\";\n    let mtask_id = \"mtask-fail\".to_string();\n    let pinned_group = 1;\n\n    // Record a write\n    manager\n        .record_write_with_quorum(session_id, mtask_id, pinned_group)\n        .await\n        .unwrap();\n\n    // Verify pin is set\n    assert_eq!(\n pinned_group)\n        .await;\n\n    assert!(cleared);\n\n    // Pin should be cleared\n    assert_eq!(manager.get_pinned_group(session_id).await, None);\n}\n\n#[tokio::test]\nasync fn test_wait_strategy() {\n    let config = SessionPinningConfig {\n        wait_strategy: \"route_pin\".to_string(),\n        ..Default::default()\n    };\n    let manager = test_manager(config);\n\n    assert_eq!(manager.wait_strategy(), WaitStrategy::RoutePin);\n\n    let config = SessionPinningConfig {\n        wait_strategy: \"block\".to_string(),\n        ..Default::default()\n    };\n    let WaitStrategy::Block);\n}\n\n#[tokio::test]\nasync fn test_prune_expired_sessions() {\n    let config = SessionPinningConfig {\n        ttl_seconds: 1,\n        ..Default::default()\n    };\n    let manager = test_manager(config);\n\n    // Add sessions\n    manager\n        .record_write_with_quorum(\"session-active\", \"mtask-a\".to_string(), 0)\n        .await\n        .unwrap();\n    manager\n        .record_write_with_quorum(\"session-expire\", \"mtask-b\".to_string(), 0)\n        .await\n        .unwrap();\n\n    // Wait for expiration\n    sleep(Duration::from_millis(1100)).await;\n\n    // Refresh session-active to keep it alive\n    manager\n        .record_write_with_quorum(\"session-active\", \"mtask-a-refreshed\".to_string(), 0)\n        .await\n        .unwrap();\n\n    // Add another active session\n    manager\n        .record_write_with_quorum(\"session-active-2\", \"mtask-c\".to_string(), 0)\n        .await\n        .unwrap();\n\n    // Prune expired\n    let pruned = manager.prune_expired().await;\n\n    // Should have pruned 1 expired session (session-expire)\n    assert_eq!(pruned, 1);\n\n    // Expired session should be gone\n    assert!(manager.get_session(\"session-expire\").await.is_none());\n\n    // Active sessions should still exist\n    assert!(manager.get_session(\"session-active\").await.is_some());\n    assert!(manager.get_session(\"session-active-2\").await.is_some());\n}\n\n#[tokio::test]\nasync fn test_delete_session() {\n    let manager = default_manager();\n\n    let session_id = \"test-session-delete\";\n    manager\n        .record_write_with_quorum(session_id, \"mtask-delete\".to_string(), 0)\n        .await\n        .unwrap();\n\n    // Verify session exists\n    assert!(manager.get_session(session_id).await.is_some());\n\n    // Delete session\n    let deleted = manager.delete_session(session_id).await;\n    assert!(deleted);\n\n    // Verify session is gone\n    assert!(manager.get_session(session_id).await.is_none());\n\n    // Delete again should return false\n    let deleted_again = manager.delete_session(session_id).await;\n    assert!(!deleted_again);\n}\n\n#[tokio::test]\nasync fn test_session_count() {\n    let manager = default_manager();\n\n    assert_eq!(manager.session_count().await, 0);\n\n    manager\n        .record_write_with_quorum(\"session-1\", \"mtask-1\".to_string(), 0)\n        .await\n        .unwrap();\n\n    assert_eq!(manager.session_count().await, 1);\n\n    manager\n        .record_write_with_quorum(\"session-2\", \"mtask-2\".to_string(), 0)\n        .await\n        .unwrap();\n\n    assert_eq!(manager.session_count().await, 2);\n\n    manager.delete_session(\"session-1\").await;\n\n    assert_eq!(manager.session_count().await, 1);\n}\n\n#[tokio::test]\nasync fn test_multiple_writes_same_session_preserves_pin() {\n    let manager = default_manager();\n\n    let session_id = \"test-session-multi\";\n    let first_group = 2;\n\n    // First write pins to group 2\n    manager\n        .record_write_with_quorum(session_id, \"mtask-1\".to_string(), first_group)\n        .await\n        .unwrap();\n\n    assert_eq!(\n        manager.get_session(session_id).await.unwrap().pinned_group,\n        Some(first_group)\n    );\n\n    // Second write tries to pin to group 3 (should be ignored)\n    manager\n        .record_write_with_quorum(session_id, \"mtask-2\".to_string(), 3)\n        .await\n        .unwrap();\n\n    // Pin should still be group 2 (first write wins)\n    assert_eq!(\n        manager.get_session(session_id).await.unwrap().pinned_group,\n        Some(first_group)\n    );\n}\n\n#[tokio::test]\nasync fn test_max_wait_duration() {\n    let config = SessionPinningConfig {\n        max_wait_ms: 10000,\n        ..Default::default()\n    };\n    let manager = test_manager(config);\n\n    assert_eq!(manager.max_wait_duration().as_millis(), 10000);\n}\n\n#[tokio::test]\nasync fn test_enabled_flag() {\n    let config = SessionPinningConfig {\n        enabled: false,\n        ..Default::default()\n    };\n    let manager = test_manager(config);\n\n ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// Integration tests: read-your-writes with task registry (plan §13.6)\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\nuse miroir_core::task::{Task, TaskRegistry, TaskStatus};\nuse miroir_core::topology::{Node, NodeId, NodeStatus, Topology};\nuse std::collections::HashMap;\n\n/// Mock task registry for testing session pinning wait behavior.\nstruct MockTaskRegistry {\n    tasks: Arc<tokio::sync::RwLock<HashMap<String, Task>>>,\n}\n\nimpl MockTaskRegistry {\n    fn new() -> Self {\n        Self {\n            tasks: Arc::new(tokio::sync::RwLock::new(HashMap::new())),\n        }\n    }\n\n    /// Add a task with a specific status.\n    async fn add_task(&self, mtask_id: String, status: TaskStatus) {\n        let mut tasks = self.tasks.write().await;\n        tasks.insert(\n            mtask_id.clone(),\n            Task {\n                miroir_id: mtask_id.clone(),\n                node_task_ids: HashMap::new(),\n                status,\n                index_uid: None,\n                task_type: None,\n                created_at: std::time::SystemTime::now()\n                    .duration_since(std::time::UNIX_EPOCH)\n                    .unwrap()\n                    .as_millis() as u64,\n            },\n        );\n    }\n\n    /// Update a task's status.\n    async fn update_task(&self, mtask_id: &str, status: TaskStatus) {\n        let mut tasks = self.tasks.write().await;\n        if let Some(task) = tasks.get_mut(mtask_id) {\n            task.status = status;\n        }\n    }\n}\n\n#[async_trait::async_trait]\nimpl TaskRegistry for MockTaskRegistry {\n    async fn get(&self, mtask_id: &str) -> std::result::Result<Option<Task>, Box<dyn std::error::Error + Send + Sync>> {\n        let tasks = self.tasks.read().await;\n        Ok(tasks.get(mtask_id).cloned())\n    }\n\n    async fn register(\n        &self,\n        _node_task_ids: HashMap<String, u64>,\n    ) -> std::result::Result<Task, Box<dyn std::error::Error + Send + Sync>> {\n        // For testing, return a dummy task\n        Ok(Task {\n            miroir_id: \"mtask-test\".to_string(),\n            node_task_ids: HashMap::new(),\n            status: TaskStatus::Enqueued,\n            index_uid: None,\n            task_type: None,\n            created_at: std::time::SystemTime::now()\n                .duration_since(std::time::UNIX_EPOCH)\n                .unwrap()\n                .as_millis() as u64,\n        })\n    }\n\n    async fn register_with_metadata(\n        &self,\n        _node_task_ids: HashMap<String, u64>,\n        _index_uid: Option<String>,\n        _task_type: Option<String>,\n    ) -> std::result::Result<Task, Box<dyn std::error::Error + Send + Sync>> {\n        // For testing, return a dummy task\n        Ok(Task {\n            miroir_id: \"mtask-test\".to_string(),\n            node_task_ids: HashMap::new(),\n            status: TaskStatus::Enqueued,\n            index_uid: None,\n            task_type: None,\n            created_at: std::time::SystemTime::now()\n                .duration_since(std::time::UNIX_EPOCH)\n                .unwrap()\n                .as_millis() as u64,\n        })\n    }\n\n    async fn list(&self, _limit: usize, _offset: usize) -> std::result::Result<Vec<Task>, Box<dyn std::error::Error + Send + Sync>> {\n        Ok(Vec::new())\n    }\n\n    async fn cancel(&self, _mtask_id: &str) -> std::result::Result<Task, Box<dyn std::error::Error + Send + Sync>> {\n        Err(\"unimplemented\".into())\n    }\n\n    async fn delete(&self, _mtask_id: &str) -> std::result::Result<(), Box<dyn std::error::Error + Send + Sync>> {\n        Err(\"unimplemented\".into())\n    }\n}\n\n/// Acceptance test 1: Write + session + immediate read with `block` → read sees the write.\n///\n/// This test verifies that when using the \"block\" wait strategy, a read with a session\n/// header will wait for the pending write to complete before proceeding.\n#[tokio::test]\nasync fn acceptance_write_session_read_with_block_strategy() {\n    let config = SessionPinningConfig {\n        wait_strategy: \"block\".to_string(),\n        max_wait_ms: 5000,\n        ..Default::default()\n    };\n    let manager = test_manager(config);\n    let task_registry = Arc::new(MockTaskRegistry::new());\n\n    let session_id = \"test-session-block-read\";\n    let mtask_id = \"mtask-block-123\".to_string();\n\n    // Record a write with session pinning\n    manager\n        .record_write_with_quorum(session_id, mtask_id.clone(), 0)\n        .await\n        .unwrap();\n\n    // Verify the session is pinned\n    assert_eq!(\n        manager.get_pinned_group(session_id).await,\n        Some(0)\n    );\n\n    // Add the task as enqueued to the mock registry\n    task_registry.add_task(mtask_id.clone(), TaskStatus::Enqueued).await;\n\n    // Spawn a background task to complete the write after a short delay\n    let registry_clone = task_registry.clone();\n    let mtask_id_clone = mtask_id.clone();\n    tokio::spawn(async move {\n        sleep(Duration::from_millis(100)).await;\n        registry_clone.update_task(&mtask_id_clone, TaskStatus::Succeeded).await;\n    });\n\n    // Read with session should block and wait for the write to complete\n    let max_wait = Duration::from_millis(5000);\n    let result = manager.wait_for_write_completion(\n        session_id,\n        &task_registry,\n        max_wait,\n    ).await;\n\n    // The wait should succeed (write completed)\n    assert!(result.is_ok());\n    assert_eq!(result.unwrap(), true);\n\n    // After completion, the session should no longer have a pending write\n    let pinned_group = manager.get_pinned_group(session_id).await;\n    assert_eq!(pinned_group, None);\n}\n\n/// Acceptance test 2: Write + session + immediate read with `route_pin` → read routed to pinned group.\n///\n/// This test verifies that when using the \"route_pin\" wait strategy, a read with a session\n/// header routes to the pinned group without waiting for the write to complete.\n#[tokio::test]\nasync fn acceptance_write_session_read_with_route_pin_strategy() {\n    let config = SessionPinningConfig {\n        wait_strategy: \"route_pin\".to_string(),\n        max_wait_ms: 5000,\n        ..Default::default()\n    };\n    let manager = test_manager(config);\n    let task_registry = Arc::new(MockTaskRegistry::new());\n\n    let session_id = \"test-session-route-pin\";\n    let mtask_id = \"mtask-route-pin-123\".to_string();\n\n    // Record a write with session pinning\n    manager\n        .record_write_with_quorum(session_id, mtask_id, 1)\n        .await\n        .unwrap();\n\n    // Verify the session is pinned to group 1\n    assert_eq!(\n        manager.get_pinned_group(session_id).await,\n        Some(1)\n    );\n\n    // With route_pin strategy, we don't wait - just check the pinned group\n    let pinned_group = manager.get_pinned_group(session_id).await;\n    assert_eq!(pinned_group, Some(1));\n\n    // The pending write should still be present (not cleared by just reading)\n    assert!(manager.get_session(session_id).await.unwrap().has_pending_write());\n}\n\n/// Acceptance test 3: Pinned group fails mid-session → pin cleared; read succeeds via another group.\n///\n/// This test verifies that when the pinned group fails, the session pin is cleared\n/// and subsequent reads can succeed via other groups.\n#[tokio::test]\nasync fn acceptance_pinned_group_failure_clears_pin() {\n    let manager = default_manager();\n\n    let session_id = \"test-session-group-fail\";\n    let mtask_id = \"mtask-group-fail\".to_string();\n    let pinned_group = 2;\n\n    // Record a write that pins to group 2\n    manager\n        .record_write_with_quorum(session_id, mtask_id, pinned_group)\n        .await\n        .unwrap();\n\n    // Verify the session is pinned\n    assert_eq!(\n        manager.get_pinned_group(session_id).await,\n        Some(pinned_group)\n    );\n\n    // Simulate group 2 failing\n    let cleared = manager\n        .handle_pinned_group_failure(session_id, pinned_group)\n        .await;\n\n    assert!(cleared, \"Pin should be cleared when pinned group fails\");\n\n    // Pin should be cleared\n    assert_eq!(\n        manager.get_pinned_group(session_id).await,\n        None,\n        \"After group failure, no pinned group should be returned\"\n    );\n\n    // The session should still exist, but with no pin\n    let session = manager.get_session(session_id).await;\n    assert!(session.is_some(), \"Session should still exist\");\n    assert_eq!(session.unwrap().pinned_group, None, \"Session should have no pinned group\");\n}\n\n/// Acceptance test 4: Session TTL expiry and LRU eviction.\n///\n/// This test verifies that:\n/// - Sessions expire after their TTL\n/// - LRU eviction happens when max_sessions is reached\n#[tokio::test]\nasync fn acceptance_session_ttl_and_lru_eviction() {\n    let config = SessionPinningConfig {\n        ttl_seconds: 1,\n        max_sessions: 3,\n        ..Default::default()\n    };\n    let manager = test_manager(config);\n\n    // Create sessions up to the limit\n    manager\n        .record_write_with_quorum(\"session-1\", \"mtask-1\".to_string(), 0)\n        .await\n        .unwrap();\n    manager\n        .record_write_with_quorum(\"session-2\", \"mtask-2\".to_string(), 0)\n        .await\n        .unwrap();\n    manager\n        .record_write_with_quorum(\"session-3\", \"mtask-3\".to_string(), 0)\n        .await\n        .unwrap();\n\n    // All three should exist\n    assert!(manager.get_session(\"session-1\").await.is_some());\n    assert!(manager.get_session(\"session-2\").await.is_some());\n    assert!(manager.get_session(\"session-3\").await.is_some());\n\n    // Adding a 4th session should evict the oldest (session-1)\n    manager\n        .record_write_with_quorum(\"session-4\", \"mtask-4\".to_string(), 0)\n        .await\n        .unwrap();\n\n    // Session-1 should be evicted\n    assert!(manager.get_session(\"session-1\").await.is_none());\n\n    // Sessions 2, 3, 4 should still exist\n    assert!(manager.get_session(\"session-2\").await.is_some());\n    assert!(manager.get_session(\"session-3\").await.is_some());\n    assert!(manager.get_session(\"session-4\").await.is_some());\n\n    // Wait for TTL expiration\n    sleep(Duration::from_millis(1100)).await;\n\n    // All remaining sessions should be expired\n    assert!(manager.get_session(\"session-2\").await.unwrap().is_expired());\n    assert!(manager.get_session(\"session-3\").await.unwrap().is_expired());\n    assert!(manager.get_session(\"session-4\").await.unwrap().is_expired());\n\n    // Prune should remove all expired sessions\n    let pruned = manager.prune_expired().await;\n    assert_eq!(pruned, 3);\n\n    // No sessions should remain\n    assert!(manager.get_session(\"session-2\").await.is_none());\n    assert!(manager.get_session(\"session-3\").await.is_none());\n    assert!(manager.get_session(\"session-4\").await.is_none());\n}\n\n/// Integration test: Session pinning with scatter plan for pinned group.\n///\n/// This test verifies that `plan_search_scatter_for_group` correctly routes\n/// all shards to the pinned replica group.\n#[tokio::test]\nasync fn integration_session_pin_with_scatter_plan() {\n    use miroir_core::scatter::plan_search_scatter_for_group;\n    use miroir_core::topology::{Node, NodeId, NodeStatus, Topology};\n\n    // Build a 2-group, 2-node-per-group topology\n    let mut topo = Topology::new(4, 2, 2);\n\n    // Add nodes to group 0\n    for i in 0..2u32 {\n        let node = Node::new(\n            NodeId::new(format!(\"node-group0-{i}\")),\n            format!(\"http://localhost:810{i}\"),\n            0,\n        );\n        topo.add_node(node);\n        topo.node_mut(&NodeId::new(format!(\"node-group0-{i}\")))\n            .unwrap()\n            .transition_to(NodeStatus::Active)\n            .unwrap();\n    }\n\n    // Add nodes to group 1\n    for i in 2..4u32 {\n        let node = Node::new(\n            NodeId::new(format!(\"node-group1-{i}\")),\n            format!(\"http://localhost:810{i}\"),\n            1,\n        );\n        topo.add_node(node);\n        topo.node_mut(&NodeId::new(format!(\"node-group1-{i}\")))\n            .unwrap()\n            .transition_to(NodeStatus::Active)\n            .unwrap();\n    }\n\n    // Plan scatter for pinned group 1\n    let plan = plan_search_scatter_for_group(&topo, 0, 2, 4, 1);\n\n    assert!(plan.is_some(), \"Plan should be created for pinned group\");\n    let plan = plan.unwrap();\n\n    // Verify the plan targets the pinned group\n    assert_eq!(plan.chosen_group, 1, \"Chosen group should be the pinned group\");\n\n    // Verify all shards are targeted\n    assert_eq!(plan.target_shards.len(), 4, \"All shards should be targeted\");\n\n    // Verify all selected nodes are from group 1\n    for (_shard_id, node_id) in &plan.shard_to_node {\n        let node = topo.node(node_id).unwrap();\n        assert_eq!(node.replica_group, 1, \"All nodes should be from pinned group 1\");\n    }\n}\n\n/// Integration test: Session pinning metrics.\n///\n/// This test verifies that session pinning metrics are properly recorded.\n#[tokio::test]\nasync fn integration_session_pinning_metrics() {\n    use miroir_core::config::MiroirConfig;\n    use miroir_proxy::middleware::Metrics;\n\n    let config = Session pinning acceptance tests (plan §13.6).\n//!\n//! Tests read-your-writes consistency via session pinning:\n//! - Write with session header → session pinned to first-quorum group\n//! - Read with session header → routes to pinned group if pending write\n//! - Block strategy: read blocks until write completes\n//! - RoutePin strategy: read routes to pinned group without waiting\n//! - Session TTL and LRU eviction\n//! - Pinned group failure handling\n\nuse std::sync::Arc;\nuse tokio::time::{sleep, Duration};\nuse miroir_core::session_pinning::{SessionManager, SessionPinningConfig, WaitStrategy};\n\n/// Helper to create a test session manager with custom config.\nfn test_manager(config: SessionPinningConfig) -> SessionManager {\n    SessionManager::new(config)\n}\n\n/// Helper to create a default test session manager.\nfn default_manager() -> SessionManager {\n    test_manager(SessionPinningConfig::default())\n}\n\n#[tokio::test]\nasync fn test_write_records_session_pin() {\n    let manager = default_manager();\n\n    // Record a write with session header\n    let session_id = \"test-session-1\";\n    let mtask_id = \"mtask-123\".to_string();\n    let first_quorum_group = 2;\n\n    manager\n        .record_write_with_quorum(session_id, mtask_id.clone(), first_quorum_group)\n        .await\n        .unwrap();\n\n    // Verify session is recorded\n    let session = manager.get_session(session_id).await.unwrap();\n    assert_eq!(session.last_write_mtask_id, Some(mtask_id));\n    assert_eq!(session.pinned_group, Some(first_quorum_group));\n    assert!(session.has_pending_write());\n}\n\n#[tokio::test]\nasync fn test_read_with_pending_write_returns_pinned_group() {\n    let manager = default_manager();\n\n    // Record a write\n    let session_id = \"test-session-2\";\n    let mtask_id = \"mtask-456\".to_string();\n    let first_quorum_group = 1;\n\n    manager\n        .record_write_with_quorum(session_id, mtask_id, first_quorum_group)\n        .await\n        .unwrap();\n\n    // Get pinned group for read\n    let pinned_group = manager.get_pinned_group(session_id).await;\n    assert_eq!(pinned_group, Some(first_quorum_group));\n}\n\n#[tokio::test]\nasync fn test_read_without_session_returns_none() {\n    let manager = default_manager();\n\n    // No session header\n    let pinned_group = manager.get_pinned_group(\"nonexistent\").await;\n    assert_eq!(pinned_group, None);\n}\n\n#[tokio::test]\nasync fn test_write_without_clearing_pending_write() {\n    let manager = default_manager();\n\n    let session_id = \"test-session-3\";\n    let mtask_id = \"mtask-789\".to_string();\n\n    // Record a write\n    manager\n        .record_write_with_quorum(session_id, mtask_id.clone(), 0)\n        .await\n        .unwrap();\n\n    // Verify pending write exists\n    assert!(manager.get_session(session_id).await.unwrap().has_pending_write());\n\n    // Clear pending write (simulating task completion)\n    manager.clear_pending_write(session_id).await;\n\n    // Verify no pending write\n    assert!(!manager.get_session(session_id).await.unwrap().has_pending_write());\n\n    // Read should not return pinned group (no pending write)\n    let pinned_group = manager.get_pinned_group(session_id).await;\n    assert_eq!(pinned_group, None);\n}\n\n#[tokio::test]\nasync fn test_session_expiration() {\n    let config = SessionPinningConfig {\n        ttl_seconds: 1, // 1 second TTL for testing\n        ..Default::default()\n    };\n    let manager = test_manager(config);\n\n    let session_id = \"test-session-expire\";\n    let mtask_id = \"mtask-expire\".to_string();\n\n    // Record a write\n    manager\n        .record_write_with_quorum(session_id, mtask_id, 0)\n        .await\n        .unwrap();\n\n    // Session should be active immediately\n    assert!(!manager.get_session(session_id).await.unwrap().is_expired());\n\n    // Wait for expiration\n    sleep(Duration::from_millis(1100)).await;\n\n    // Session should be expired\n    assert!(manager.get_session(session_id).await.unwrap().is_expired());\n\n    // Pinned group should be None for expired session\n    let pinned_group = manager.get_pinned_group(session_id).await;\n    assert_eq!(pinned_group, None);\n}\n\n#[tokio::test]\nasync fn test_max_sessions_lru_eviction() {\n    let config = SessionPinningConfig {\n        max_sessions: 2,\n        ..Default::default()\n    };\n    let manager = test_manager(config);\n\n    // Add first session\n    manager\n        .record_write_with_quorum(\"session-1\", .await\n        .unwrap();\n\n    // Add third session (should evict first session)\n    manager\n        .record_write_with_quorum(\"session-3\", \"mtask-3\".to_string(), 0)\n        .await\n        .unwrap();\n\n    // First session should be evicted\n    assert!(manager.get_session(\"session-1\").await.is_none());\n\n    // Second and third should still exist\n  index_uid: None,\n                task_type: None,\n                error: None,\n            };\n            let mut tasks = self.tasks.write().await;\n            tasks.insert(mtask_id.clone(), task.clone());\n            Ok(task)\n        })\n    }\n\n    fn update_status(&self, miroir_id: &str, status: TaskStatus) -> Result<()> {\n        let rt = tokio::runtime::Handle::try_current()\n            .map_err(|_| MiroirError::InvalidState(\"no tokio runtime\".to_string()))?;\n        rt.block_on(async {\n            let mut tasks = self.tasks.write().await;\n            if let Some(task) = tasks.get_mut(miroir_id) {\n                task.status = status;\n            }\n            Ok(())\n        })\n    }\n\n    fn update_node_task(\n        &self,\n        _miroir_id: &str,\n        _node_id: &str,\n        _node_status: miroir_core::task::NodeTaskStatus,\n    ) -> Result<()> {\n        Ok(())\n    }\n\n    fn list(&self, _filter: miroir_core::task::TaskFilter) -> Result<Vec<MiroirTask>> {\n        Ok(Vec::new())\n    }\n\n    fn count(&self) -> usize {\n        0\n    }\n}\n\n/// Acceptance test 1: Write + session + immediate read with `block` → read sees the write.\n///\n/// This test verifies that when using the \"block\" wait strategy, a read with a session\n/// header will wait for the pending write to complete before proceeding.\n#[tokio::test]\nasync fn acceptance_write_session_read_with_block_strategy() {\n    let config = SessionPinningConfig {\n        wait_strategy: \"block\".to_string(),\n        max_wait_ms: 5000,\n        ..Default::default()\n    };\n    let manager = test_manager(config);\n    let task_registry = Arc::new(MockTaskRegistry::new());\n\n    let session_id = \"test-session-block-read\";\n    let mtask_id = \"mtask-block-123\".to_string();\n\n    // Record a write with session pinning\n    manager\n        .record_write_with_quorum(session_id, mtask_id.clone(), 0)\n        .await\n        .unwrap();\n\n    // Verify the session is pinned\n    assert_eq!(\n        manager.get_pinned_group(session_id).await,\n        Some(0)\n    );\n\n    // Add the task as enqueued to the mock registry\n    task_registry.add_task(mtask_id.clone(), TaskStatus::Enqueued).await;\n\n    // Spawn a background task to complete the write after a short delay\n    let registry_clone = task_registry.clone();\n    let mtask_id_clone = mtask_id.clone();\n    tokio::spawn(async move {\n        sleep(Duration::from_millis(100)).await;\n        registry_clone.update_task(&mtask_id_clone, TaskStatus::Succeeded).await;\n    });\n\n    // Read with session should block and wait for the write to complete\n    let max_wait = Duration::from_millis(5000);\n    let result = manager.wait_for_write_completion(\n        session_id,\n        &task_registry,\n        max_wait,\n    ).await;\n\n    // The wait should succeed (write completed)\n    assert!(result.is_ok());\n    assert_eq!(result.unwrap(), true);\n\n    // After completion, the session should no longer have a pending write\n    let pinned_group = manager.get_pinned_group(session_id).await;\n    assert_eq!(pinned_group, None);\n}\n\n/// Acceptance test 2: Write + session + immediate read with `route_pin` → read routed to pinned group.\n///\n/// This test verifies that when using the \"route_pin\" wait strategy, a read with a session\n/// header routes to the pinned group without waiting for the write to complete.\n#[tokio::test]\nasync fn acceptance_write_session_read_with_route_pin_strategy() {\n    let config = SessionPinningConfig {\n        wait_strategy: \"route_pin\".to_string(),\n        max_wait_ms: 5000,\n        ..Default::default()\n    };\n    let manager = test_manager(config);\n    let task_registry = Arc::new(MockTaskRegistry::new());\n\n    let session_id = \"test-session-route-pin\";\n    let mtask_id = \"mtask-route-pin-123\".to_string();\n\n    // Record a write with session pinning\n    manager\n        .record_write_with_quorum(session_id, mtask_id, 1)\n        .await\n        .unwrap();\n\n    // Verify the session is pinned to group 1\n    assert_eq!(\n        manager.get_pinned_group(session_id).await,\n        Some(1)\n    );\n\n    // With route_pin strategy, we don't wait - just check the pinned group\n    let pinned_group = manager.get_pinned_group(session_id).await;\n    assert_eq!(pinned_group, Some(1));\n\n    // The pending write should still be present (not cleared by just reading)\n    assert!(manager.get_session(session_id).await.unwrap().has_pending_write());\n}\n\n/// Acceptance test 3: Pinned group fails mid-session → pin cleared; read succeeds via another group.\n///\n/// This test verifies that when the pinned group fails, the session pin is cleared\n/// and subsequent reads can succeed via other groups.\n#[tokio::test]\nasync fn acceptance_pinned_group_failure_clears_pin() {\n    let manager = default_manager();\n\n    let session_id = \"test-session-group-fail\";\n    let mtask_id = \"mtask-group-fail\".to_string();\n    let pinned_group = 2;\n\n    // Record a write that pins to group 2\n    manager\n        .record_write_with_quorum(session_id, mtask_id, pinned_group)\n        .await\n        .unwrap();\n\n    // Verify the session is pinned\n    assert_eq!(\n        manager.get_pinned_group(session_id).await,\n        Some(pinned_group)\n    );\n\n    // Simulate group 2 failing\n    let cleared = manager\n        .handle_pinned_group_failure(session_id, pinned_group)\n        .await;\n\n    assert!(cleared, \"Pin should be cleared when pinned group fails\");\n\n    // Pin should be cleared\n    assert_eq!(\n        manager.get_pinned_group(session_id).await,\n        None,\n        \"After group failure, no pinned group should be returned\"\n    );\n\n    // The session should still exist, but with no pin\n    let session = manager.get_session(session_id).await;\n    assert!(session.is_some(), \"Session should still exist\");\n    assert_eq!(session.unwrap().pinned_group, None, \"Session should have no pinned group\");\n}\n\n/// Acceptance test 4: Session TTL expiry and LRU eviction.\n///\n/// This test verifies that:\n/// - Sessions expire after their TTL\n/// - LRU eviction happens when max_sessions is reached\n#[tokio::test]\nasync fn acceptance_session_ttl_and_lru_eviction() {\n    let config = SessionPinningConfig {\n        ttl_seconds: 1,\n        max_sessions: 3,\n        ..Default::default()\n    };\n    let manager = test_manager(config);\n\n    // Create sessions up to the limit\n    manager\n        .record_write_with_quorum(\"session-1\", \"mtask-1\".to_string(), 0)\n        .await\n        .unwrap();\n    manager\n        .record_write_with_quorum(\"session-2\", \"mtask-2\".to_string(), 0)\n        .await\n        .unwrap();\n    manager\n        .record_write_with_quorum(\"session-3\", \"mtask-3\".to_string(), 0)\n        .await\n        .unwrap();\n\n    // All three should exist\n    assert!(manager.get_session(\"session-1\").await.is_some());\n    assert!(manager.get_session(\"session-2\").await.is_some());\n    assert!(manager.get_session(\"session-3\").await.is_some());\n\n    // Adding a 4th session should evict the oldest (session-1)\n    manager\n        .record_write_with_quorum(\"session-4\", \"mtask-4\".to_string(), 0)\n        .await\n        .unwrap();\n\n    // Session-1 should be evicted\n    assert!(manager.get_session(\"session-1\").await.is_none());\n\n    // Sessions 2, 3, 4 should still exist\n    assert!(manager.get_session(\"session-2\").await.is_some());\n    assert!(manager.get_session(\"session-3\").await.is_some());\n    assert!(manager.get_session(\"session-4\").await.is_some());\n\n    // Wait for TTL expiration\n    sleep(Duration::from_millis(1100)).await;\n\n    // All remaining sessions should be expired\n    assert!(manager.get_session(\"session-2\").await.unwrap().is_expired());\n    assert!(manager.get_session(\"session-3\").await.unwrap().is_expired());\n    assert!(manager.get_session(\"session-4\").await.unwrap().is_expired());\n\n    // Prune should remove all expired sessions\n    let pruned = manager.prune_expired().await;\n    assert_eq!(pruned, 3);\n\n    // No sessions should remain\n    assert!(manager.get_session(\"session-2\").await.is_none());\n    assert!(manager.get_session(\"session-3\").await.is_none());\n    assert!(manager.get_session(\"session-4\").await.is_none());\n}\n\n/// Integration test: Session pinning with scatter plan for pinned group.\n///\n/// This test verifies that `plan_search_scatter_for_group` correctly routes\n/// all shards to the pinned replica group.\n#[tokio::test]\nasync fn integration_session_pin_with_scatter_plan() {\n    use miroir_core::scatter::plan_search_scatter_for_group;\n    use miroir_core::topology::{Node, NodeId, NodeStatus, Topology};\n\n    // Build a 2-group, 2-node-per-group topology\n    let mut topo = Topology::new(4, 2, 2);\n\n    // Add nodes to group 0\n    for i in 0..2u32 {\n        let node = Node::new(\n            NodeId::new(format!(\"node-group0-{i}\")),\n            format!(\"http://localhost:810{i}\"),\n            0,\n        );\n        topo.add_node(node);\n        topo.node_mut(&NodeId::new(format!(\"node-group0-{i}\")))\n            .unwrap()\n            .transition_to(NodeStatus::Active)\n            .unwrap();\n    }\n\n    // Add nodes to group 1\n    for i in 2..4u32 {\n        let node = Node::new(\n            NodeId::new(format!(\"node-group1-{i}\")),\n            format!(\"http://localhost:810{i}\"),\n            1,\n        );\n        topo.add_node(node);\n        topo.node_mut(&NodeId::new(format!(\"node-group1-{i}\")))\n            .unwrap()\n            .transition_to(NodeStatus::Active)\n            .unwrap();\n    }\n\n    // Plan scatter for pinned group 1\n    let plan = plan_search_scatter_for_group(&topo, 0, 2, 4, 1);\n\n    assert!(plan.is_some(), \"Plan should be created for pinned group\");\n    let plan = plan.unwrap();\n\n    // Verify the plan targets the pinned group\n    assert_eq!(plan.chosen_group, 1, \"Chosen group should be the pinned group\");\n\n    // Verify all shards are targeted\n    assert_eq!(plan.target_shards.len(), 4, \"All shards should be targeted\");\n\n    // Verify all selected nodes are from group 1\n    for (_shard_id, node_id) in &plan.shard_to_node {\n        let node = topo.node(node_id).unwrap();\n        assert_eq!(node.replica_group, 1, \"All nodes should be from pinned group 1\");\n    }\n}\n\n/// Integration test: Session pinning metrics.\n///\n/// This test verifies that session pinning metrics
